name: Green Door / Зелёная Дверь brand kit
description: High-key line-art identity system for a literary open edition / branching container website.

typography.title: Georgia / Times-like elegant serif, uppercase, wide tracking
typography.body: Inter / system sans-serif for web readability
typography.subtitle: Italic serif, muted moss green

rules: Use warm white space as the main field.
Keep black/graphite lines thin and precise.
Use muted door green as the only strong accent.
Use branching as route/container diagrams, not as body symbolism.
Avoid lush central tree imagery, erotic/fertility associations, dark gothic lighting, neon, and heavy shading.
